data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Data is encrypted both in transit and at rest to protect user privacy.

data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Employs a Zero Trust model where no device or user is automatically trusted.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Advanced protection mechanisms are in place to mitigate distributed denial of service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Traffic filtering, Rate limiting, Edge network protection

data.title: Vulnerability Scanning
data.description: Regular automated scanning for vulnerabilities across the site.
data.technical_spec: Security patches, CVE monitoring, Penetration testing

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Robust systems for secure user authentication and session management.
